fato_historico: 1982: Two hundred sixty-eight Guatemalan campesinos ("peasants" or "country people") are slain in the Plan de Sánchez massacre.
energia_do_dia: Today, your sensitive soul may feel the weight of history, as collective stories of resilience surface. It is a good time to honor the strength within your ancestry. Perhaps you can channel this awareness into deep empathy, allowing your heart to bloom with compassion, much like a four-leaf clover found amidst challenging ground.
frase_do_dia: May your spirit remain a sanctuary of light and enduring grace today.
significado_numero: Represents the infinite flow of cosmic justice and inner strength.
conselho: Consider gentle acts of kindness to restore peace in your immediate surroundings.
